<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Entity; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface; use RuntimeException; /** * Class NoRequestResponseTrait * * Allow an entity to contain last request / response objects. * * @deprecated This information will no longer be available at the model level but the API client level */ trait NoRequestResponseTrait { /** * @param ResponseInterface $response deprecated */ public function setResponse(ResponseInterface $response): void { throw new RuntimeException(self::class . ' does not support request / response'); } /** * @param RequestInterface $request deprecated */ public function setRequest(RequestInterface $request): void { throw new RuntimeException(self::class . ' does not support request / response'); } public function getRequest(): void { } public function getResponse(): void { } }
